name: StayOnScreen
shortDescription: Constrain object position to remain within the camera viewport boundaries.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Force the object to stay visible on the screen by setting back its 2D position inside the viewport of the camera.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: StayOnScreen

eventsFunctions.name: MarginTop
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the top margin (in pixels) to leave between the object and the screen border.

eventsFunctions.name: SetMarginTop
eventsFunctions.description: Change the top margin (in pixels) to leave between the object and the screen border.

eventsFunctions.name: MarginBottom
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the bottom margin (in pixels) to leave between the object and the screen border.

eventsFunctions.name: SetMarginBottom
eventsFunctions.description: Change the bottom margin (in pixels) to leave between the object and the screen border.

eventsFunctions.name: MarginLeft
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the left margin (in pixels) to leave between the object and the screen border.

eventsFunctions.name: SetMarginLeft
eventsFunctions.description: Change the left margin (in pixels) to leave between the object and the screen border.

eventsFunctions.name: MarginRight
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the right margin (in pixels) to leave between the object and the screen border.

eventsFunctions.name: SetMarginRight
eventsFunctions.description: Change the right margin (in pixels) to leave between the object and the screen border.

description:
Force the object to stay visible on the screen by setting back its 2D position (X and Y coordinates) inside the viewport of the camera.

The shoot'em up example uses this extension ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://space-shooter)).
